description: Brachythecium mildeanum is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae.
Brachythecium salebrosum is a species of moss in the Brachytheciaceae family. It is widely distributed throughout the world, except for in South-America and in tropical regions.
Eurhynchiastrum pulchellum is a species of mosses belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae. It is the sole species of the genus Eurhynchiastrum.
Eurhynchium praelongum is a species of moss with a widespread distribution. Found in Australia, New Zealand, North America, northern South America, Eurasia and North Africa.
Eurhynchium striatum is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae.
Homalothecium sericeum is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae.

Kindbergia praelonga, known as common feather-moss, is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae. It is a medium to large size moss with pinnate branches. The species is of interest for having properties that may be beneficial for human health.
Pseudoscleropodium purum, or neat feather-moss, is a species of moss and the sole representative of the genus Pseudoscleropodium.
Rhynchostegium murale is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae and native to Europe and eastern Asia.
Rhynchotegium serrulatum is a species of moss in the Brachytheciaceae family. It is mainly distributed throughout the Americas.
